justifications.clarity: Definitions are precise and transitions are smooth throughout; minor demerit for mixed continuous/discrete indexing in Definition~\ref{def:ch13-walk-forward} where '$kh \leq t$' requires the reader to infer that $t$ is integer-indexed.
justifications.rigor: Two concrete errors undermine quantitative credibility: (1) in Example 1 the weight $120/1000 = 0.12$ is printed as $0.012$ in the ECE arithmetic on line 118; (2) the factor-alpha equation (eq:ch13-factor-alpha) cites \cite{fama1970efficient}---the market-efficiency paper---instead of the standard Fama-French three-factor reference \cite{fama1993common}.
justifications.completeness: All five learning objectives are covered and examples are well-chosen, but prompt sensitivity as an evaluation fragility source is mentioned only in passing and no end-of-chapter exercises are provided, which is required by project convention.
justifications.pedagogy: Learning objectives are stated upfront, difficulty progresses logically from calibration basics to economic metrics, and two well-placed worked examples ground the theory; the only gap is the absence of end-of-chapter exercises.
justifications.style: Writing is natural and professional with consistent LaTeX citation style; the subsection heading 'Empirical Evidence: LLMs Achieve 51--65\% Accuracy on 250 Stocks' reads as a newspaper headline inconsistent with the neutral academic tone of adjacent section titles.
